name: SCC_SLAC_GetReservedField
title: SCC_SLAC_GetReservedField
syntax: long SCC_SLAC_GetReservedField ( dword Index, byte Data[], dword& DataSize )
description: Queries one of the reserved fields of the message. For a valid message, these fields must contain only zeroes.

parameters.name: Index
parameters.description: Number of the reserved field (0 or 1)

return: Data and length of the reserved field.
